patch.value: Model-agnostic search: provider settable via pm config + docs + index staleness surfacing

From search/docs review (pm-a0w4). Core IS model-agnostic (openai+ollama provider types, base_url/model/api_key config-driven; LM Studio/vLLM work via openai provider with custom base_url). Gaps: (C-1) CONFIG_KEY_ALIASES has zero search/provider/embedding keys, so pointing pm at LM Studio/custom OpenAI requires hand-editing settings.json — add CLI config keys. (D-2) CONFIGURATION.md never shows a concrete custom-provider example and never names LM Studio/vLLM — making model-agnostic config undiscoverable. (C-3) No onWrite index hook; semantic/hybrid read a pre-built store and require manual pm reindex — surface index staleness at query time or add incremental on-write indexing. (C-4) CLI search defaults to FULL projection (token-heavy); MCP defaults compact — consider --compact default for CLI.

Shipped 3 of 4 listed gaps: (C-1) Added 16 nested-setting CLI aliases for search/provider/vector-store leaves via new descriptor table in src/core/config/nested-settings.ts; pm config <scope> set/get and pm config list surface them. (D-2) Added Custom search providers section to docs/CONFIGURATION.md with concrete pm config commands for Ollama, OpenAI, LM Studio, vLLM, and Vector store. (C-3) Lifted collectStaleVectorizationIds into src/core/search/staleness.ts and call it from src/cli/commands/search.ts at semantic/hybrid query time (only when mode is explicit); emits warning line + JSON warning vector_index_stale:N. NOT shipped: (C-4) CLI search compact default — would be a breaking change for human users; separate decision needed.

Agents and humans can now configure ANY OpenAI-compatible or Ollama-style provider via pm config commands alone (no settings.json hand-edits); docs name LM Studio + vLLM with copy-pasteable examples; semantic/hybrid search emits a one-line staleness warning at query time.

Verified end-to-end in /tmp/pm-e2e: pm config project set search_provider ollama works; ratio bounds rejected with clear error (1.5 → number in [0, 1]); pm config project list surfaces all 16 nested_settings entries; vector index staleness warning fires from search.ts:241-272 with both stderr line and result.warnings entry. 90/90 new tests pass; 100% coverage on nested-settings.ts.

Shipped 16 nested-setting CLI aliases + CONFIGURATION.md custom-provider examples + query-time index staleness warning. (C-4) CLI search compact default deferred — separate decision needed for human-CLI breaking change.
